settings.highlight: SKILL: Rank\/Percent towards next rank\/Amount learning\/Mindstate [Ff]raction
^(Obvious (exits|paths)|Room (Number|Exits)|Showing all skills with field experience.|Also here):
swallow|corn maze|fuzzy dice pouch with black cording|wide leather war belt with an agonite-inlaid gargoyle buckle
(?:is registered to someone else|[Uu]nfamiliar marks of registration)
You notice unfamiliar marks of registration upon it\.
\w+'s? name appears on the result board!

\b(agonite|muracite|telothian|tyrium|bloodscrip|inkpot|blade|handle|pommel|haralun|mistwood|kertig|ruby chunk|onyx chunk|sapphire chunk|unembellished ring|platinum chain|mortar|clamps|bellows|svidaw sis instructions|shovel|pliers|bowl|knitting needles|scissors|bone saw|forging mallet|flamewood riste|spike|textbook|shackle|razaksel|iron scimitar|battle axe|warrior's belt|leathers|harness|stonebow|latchbow)\b

\b(?:Encumbrance|Name|Race|Guild|Gender|Age|Circle|Wealth|Debt|Favors|Encumbrance|Time Development Points|Deaths|Departs|Overall state of mind|Rested EXP Stored|Usable This Cycle|Cycle Refreshes|Total Ranks Displayed|Skills Included|(\w+) Average)\s?:
^A tingling on the back of your neck draws attention to itself by disappearing, making you believe the heat is off from your last break in\.

^Your formation of a targeting pattern.*|^You leap out of hiding.*|.*position yourself behind.*|.*masterfully position yourself to strike.*|.*best shot possible.*|^You dash forward.*|^Utilizing flawless combat expertise.*|^You feel fully prepared to cast your.*|^Your target pattern has finished forming around the area|^A radiant aura empowers the spell
.*begins to advance on you.$|[tT]here is nothing in there|^You've gained a new rank in.*$|The groaning sound culminates in a section of wall

^An armored warklin crumbles.*|.*a grating bellow.*|^The scout (gurgles|coughs up).*|^The wind hound lets loose.*|^A zombie stomper falls belly-up.*|.*eyes glaze over.*|.*closing its eyes forever.*|.*eyes roll back in its head.*|.*one last time and collapses.*|^A storm bull expires.*
\b(feel a warmth radiate from [^ ]+ touch|feel fully rested|have a brief sensation that leaves your wounds tingling)\.
^You sense a successful empathic link.*|^You sense that.*|^The internal (wounds|scars).*|\'s injuries include\.\.\.
(\.\.\. no injuries to speak of|\w+ has normal vitality)\.

.*You turn toward \w+ and notice that \w+ appearance has changed\.|^Inhaling deeply, you close your eyes, focusing intently on reshaping \w+'s? body to your will\.\.\.|^You concentrate on the changes taking place in \w+'s body, guiding it and molding it to your will\.|^Your empathic senses stretch out, forming a link so intense that your breathing slows almost to a stop\.|^You feel the link growing further in strength, demanding all of your thought and concentration\.|^\[Type SHIFT \w+ to begin the transformation.\]|^You bend all your senses to the changes in each particle of \w+\'s body, some growing, some shrinking away, and others changing form and color\.|^Stretching your senses along the link with \w+, you slowly lose the boundary between \w+ and yourself, until you feel the changes moving and shaping as though they were in your own body\.
^You don't feel as if you've sufficiently recovered from the previous shift\.
^You feel your ability to Shift return to you\.

(Augmentation|Debilitation|Targeted|Utility|Warding) Mastery|(Raw|Efficient) (Channeling|Harnessing)|Deep Attunement|Improved Memory|Improvised Rituals|Magic Theorist|Mental Matrices|Sorcerous Patterns|Symbiotic Research
^You begin chanting a mantra.*|^You trace a.*
You feel fully prepared to seek assistance from the Immortals once again\.
You also see a subtle trail\.
^A feeling of shock washes through your veins.*|^A hulking Xala'shar magus glowers darkly at.*
settings.combat_gag: You're (?!hurt|beat up|very beat up|badly hurt|very badly hurt|smashed up).* balanced and .* (?:position|advantage)
settings.gag: < You (?:bash|chop|claw|draw|elbow|feint|fire|gouge|have|jab|kick|lob|lunge|poach|punch|slam|slap|slice|stomp|sweep|swing|thrust)

^\w+ turns a vardite skeleton key at|^A sharp click emanates from the locking mechanism|^\w+ drops .* into a portable silversteel bucket|from inside (?:his|her) (?:jadeleaf satchel|ankle purse|lotusweave bag|traveler's pack|(?:cloth|leather) loot(?:bag|pouch|sack|belt))|bows \w+ head and chants a mantra|drums \w+ fingers on \w+ bucket rhythmically|(?:roots|forages) around the area|(?:to a strap on|from the straps of) \w+ cotton odaj|^\w+ rummages through|^After a moment, a dull \*THUD\* echoes from within the bucket|^\w+'s feet are (?:soaked|dripping with water)

An unknown substance contained within the vial dangling from your tursa chain glows ominously scarlet|emits a loud \*snap\*\.|^\w+ dripping water everywhere\.|^\w+ gestures\.|^\w+ (?:unties|attaches)|^You decipher the telltale signs of|^The pure golden glow dissipates from|^A pure golden glow enwreathes|^The key writhes in your hand|^\w+ retreats from combat|^You turn a vardite skeleton key at|^\w+ bows (?:his|her) head and chants a (?:prayer|psalm)|^\w+ begins to focus intently around h(?:er|im)self|strikes (?:his|her) heel against the ground

^\w+ opens (?:his|her) soft gem pouch and quickly fills it with gems|A group of the insects launch themselves at|The studs on your wristcuff flicker, and you feel more battle-ready|The beads on your armband flicker, and you feel more battle-ready\.|^The leaves on your lirisan wristcuff|^Your moonsilver wristcuff briefly shimmers|^The bindings of your bitterweave wristwrap tighten momentarily|^The Imperial dira centered upon your leather armlet shimmers|^\w+ begins to lecture \w+|^A painful lump rises in your throat as some nearby shadows darken
<preset id="whisper">\w+ whispers,</preset> "(?:Done!|heal)"$|<preset id="whisper">You whisper to \w+,</preset> "(?:heal|Thank you\.)"$

^\w+ stops playing (?:her|his) song|^\w+ raises (?:her|his) hands skyward, chanting|morgawr bone armband flares with radiant light|^Several of the charms on|^\w+ gets a quiet, peaceful look on \w+ face|jaguar-pelt \w+ flicker briefly

^\w+\s(?:begins?|finishes?).*(?:zills|cowbell).*|^\w+\s(?:gazes? intently into|exhales softly on) \w+ sanowret crystal.*|You hear in your mind a quiet recollection|^You feel fully attuned to the mana streams|^Knowledge from your sanowret crystal

launches into the next verse|on (?:his|her).*cowbell|leans? forward.*(?:zills|cowbell)|^The \w+ comes alive in your hand|^It is mere moments afterward that you feel an itching|bends \w+ head over.*(?:zills|cowbell)|^A soft light blossoms in the very center
(?:crown|thighband) pulses with a soft light|pendant flash white for a moment|shimmer with a strikingly green (?:sheen|hue)|continues? to (?:play|perform).*(?:zills|cowbell)
you continue (?:to (?:play|perform)|playing your.*(?:zills|cowbell))|^You.*(?:play|begin).*(?:zills|cowbell)
\w+ drops some coins into the Darkbox|removes \w+ hand from the Darkbox looking both relieved

^(?:<.*>)?(?:The|A|An) (?:telga orek|ice archon|storm bull|(?:elder )?Adan'f blademaster|(?:bone|adult|young|juvenile) wyvern|jeol moradu|silver-grey cloud rat|(?:fuligin|void-black|shadowfrost)?\s?(?:umbral )?moth|Dragon Priest intercessor)

begins to advance on a jeol moradu|stops advancing since a jeol moradu is dead|\w+ feints .* at a jeol moradu|>A jeol moradu (?:feints|lunges|slices|thrusts)|The stream of liquid blue-white fire washes over a jeol moradu|^You search the jeol moradu|^Icy blue frost crackles up a jeol moradu|^A jeol moradu (?:roars in frustration|howls in encouragement|walks \w+ with thundering steps|growls out a spell in a thunderous voice|melts away, its remains soaked up by the ground)|^With a thunderous stride, a jeol moradu arrives|^A soft crackle briefly comes from a jeol moradu's direction|^The ground shakes as a jeol moradu thunders in with a blast of frigid air

^A storm bull|^A soft crackle briefly comes from a storm bull's direction|^(?:Raising its head, )?(?:[aA]|The) storm bull.*|^(?:Sparks of electricity shimmer around a storm bull's body|Misty tendrils rise from the pale hide of a storm bull|A musical note swells in the air as a storm bull brushes|Horns lowered, a storm bull charges|Shifting from side to side, a storm bull crops)

^An ice archon (?:backs away from combat|moves into view|moves ponderously|raises its massive icy foot)|A pile of broken ice slowly loses its shape|A creaking noise of ice scraping against ice|^An ice archon|Appearing to have lost sight of its target, an ice archon stops advancing|climbed (?:down|up) a snow-covered cliff

^Slowly the corpse of a bone wyvern decays into a mass of brittle old bone|^With a ghostly wail a bone wyvern charges into view|^An icy wail cuts through the air as a bone wyvern soars|^You stop advancing because a bone wyvern is dead|^\w+ drops a wyvern claw|^The battle-worn carcass of a \w+ wyvern rots away|^The \w+ wyvern (?:is still a distance away|slowly tips over|'s tail lashes)|^The battered form of a \w+ wyvern slowly decomposes|^Glancing about, an? \w+ wyvern opens its mouth|^With a low growl an? \w+ wyvern skulks|^An? \w+ wyvern (?:snarls loudly|shakes its head|emits a guttural|rakes its black talons|grooms its scales|wakes up|slowly skulks into view|begins to move again|thrashes its leathery-black wings|fluidly leaps to its feet|bounds into view|thrashes its long neck|lurches forward|suddenly draws|hops into view|appears less distracted|draws in a deep breath)|^You can no longer see openings in a young wyvern's defenses|^With its massive leathery-black wings bound in layers|^A gutteral roar cuts through the air as an adult wyvern swoops|^Frozen in place, an adult wyvern's eyes sweep

you notice a fuligin moth trying to|^A nearby shadow darkens and expands, coalescing into a fuligin umbral moth|^The restraints binding a fuligin umbral moth grow soft|is entangled by the encroaching web\.$|^The strong smell of ozone accompanies

^The scavenger giant begins to incant|^A dark cloud coalesces over the body of the scavenger giant|^A scavenger giant crashes to the ground|^(?:A scavenger giant gestures|A faint breeze surrounds \w+)\.

^(?:With a slight \*tink!\*, an enriched crauyarin scuttler shatters|A single point of red light expands|Flares of crystalline white luminance bloom|Clear blue light falls about the crauyarin scuttler|Entangling their protuberances, a pair of crauyarin scuttlers|Sudden movement in your peripheral vision reveals a crauyarin scuttler|Your vision skews wildly)|^A crauyarin scuttler (?:swiftly skitters|exchanges semaphoric|glows red and blue)|^(?:The)?\s?(?:Luminous cracks appear|curvature of|Gossamer light skips|A soft crackle briefly comes from|Great zigzag fissures|A hexagonal section of|crystalline white flares|Rearing back,)?\s?(?:[Aa]n enriched)?\s?crauyarin scuttler

\[.*(?:overwhelming|dominating) (your)?\s?opponent|^I could not find what you were referring to|^You search the|^You quickly pocket the coins|^You gather up the loot you're interested in|A blazing flame-like droplet lands|^(?:A|The) shimmering ethereal shield|^\w+ manages? to get out of the way of the spinning scythe!|^The scythe swiftly melts away\.|begins to listen to \w+ teach the Scholarship skill
stops? a .* from advancing any farther|^The .* begins to advance on|closes? to (?:melee|pole weapon) range on|^\w+ assesses (?:his|her) combat situation
closes to pole (?:weapon|melee) range on you!$|^Showing all skills with field experience

assumes a \w+ stance, concentrating on something|^The .* lands at \w+('s)? feet|^\w's \w+ lands|^You aren't close enough to attack|^What do you want to advance towards|^(<pushStream id="combat" />)?(?:A|The) hellish spiral|^You are able to channel all the energy|^The .* absorbs all of the energy|^You are already advancing on|(?:wanders|runs|strolls|goes|drifts|went) (?:north|south|east|west|(?:north|south)east|west|up|down|across)\.$

You feel a chill as a spell breaches your ward\!|^A faint sizzling sound fills the air|^A disturbing black radiance creeps over|^Blood pumping loudly, you whip about in a tumultuous fury|^The \w+ of your wristcuff flicker and you feel more battle-ready|^The nearby shadows swell before an elder Adan|^The chakrel dust upon the surface of your manacle glows|^\s+"?Adan'f (?:lusss|inja)|\w+ with a (?:sharp )?\*crack\*!$|^The taipan tightens its coils about your arm|^You bull-rush at

^The quaking fury inside of you continues unabated|^You struggle to maintain the quaking fury|^The air randomly discharges, leaving behind the scent of ozone|^The air around \w+ begins to crackle with static electricity|^The insects continue to swarm|^\w+ visibly quakes with an inner fury

^One of the etched patterns upon your frozen-bone wristcuff|^Within the flow of whispered chanting nearby|^The viscous (?:solution drenches|goo burbles)|whirls about in a bold, flashy manner!$|visibly churns with an inner rage!$|^\w+ manages? to remain upright\!|^The castoff flecks fade to black
The trickles of (?:silver-grey|blue-white) magma cool|(?:silver-grey|blue-white) lava|then quickly steps forward spinning like a dervish|steps forward and spins
The \w+ lava .* splashes .* burn\.
^You notice( as)? a sinewy leopard|^The serpent earcuff coils, sensing your danger|^Your wooden medallion warms in response|^Your purpleheart seed begins to pulsate

(?:sprawls|slumps) wearily(?:and (?:passes out|drops like a rock), (?:dead to the world|having yielded to your lullaby))?\.$|^You sense deep traces of empathic shock within|^The molten Life flowing in your blood quickens you|^You feel the warmth in your flesh gradually subside|^EXP HELP for more information
^Your (?:shield|(?:chain )?hauberk) \w+|^(?:A|The) blue-dappled prereni

^Tiny vengeance rubies on \w+'s leather armband pulse|^The tiny vengeance rubies scattered across your leather armband|blighted gold bracelet flares with radiant light|a sense of peace and restfulness spreading through you|^Overall state of mind: clear
^One of the planetary discs on your uthamar anklet briefly darkens|^Water drips from your thin-edged zills\.|^A faint breeze surrounds it|and is closing steadily\.$

^(?:A faint trail of gleaming|A trio of|One of the|Sparkles follow the|The).*multihued moons.*right forearm|multihued moons suddenly accelerate their chase|A dull crimson glow radiates from \w+'s wooden medallion

^The light and crystal sound of your sanowret crystal fades|^The spirit of the cheetah surges through your veins|^You exhale softly on your sanowret crystal|^With a \*click\*, your changes snap into place|^You fiddle with the tiny levers and dials|^Delicate phofe flowers slowly drift and swirl

^Turning to the next page in your kuwinite codex, you read more about the Gorbesh religion|^Her Domain being Spirit, Orisas is the mightiest|^Orisas' planet is Osec|^The Domain of Sraxaec is Blood|^The God of Life especially favors those wounded|^Master of the Domain of Iron, Tieheq is the fiercest|^It is believed that it was Tieheq that went to Xin'Alaudas|^With her Domain of Fire, Merion is the most favored|^It is Merion that devised the arts of Forging|^Eimeuz controls the Domain of Wood|^Eimeuz is especially fond of the forests|^Possessing the Domain of Storm, Aniek is the cruel Goddess|^While all ships bear seals of Eimeuz|^When the land was covered in cold for all the year|^With her Domain of Clay, Aliesa is the kind goddess|^But, she is a great warrior with the fury of a mother|^Master of the Domain of Mist, Sieben is a fickle|^The following document contains some details on the religion of the Gorbesh|^With his Domain of Bone, Xosiurion is the God of Dragons|^Many legends and stories surround the mythic battle between Xosiurion|^Misiumos is the cold and defiant goddess of the Domain of Ice

^Blade spiders inhabit the Undergondola|^Nightweaver, nightreaver, and nightstalker unyns|^The Harawep's Spider and Harawep's Pawn spider are especially|^The tomiek-iguji \("deceit-spider" in Gorbesh\)|^Sacred to Harawep, wildling spiders are a sentient race|^Zynachi \("assassin" in Gamgweth\) spiders are a swamp-dwelling|^While conventional spiders spin silk, elder wildling spiders spin wildlace|^Effectively immortal, wildling spiders live until killed|^Unlike conventional spiders, wildling spiders feed on mana|^Wildling spiders are a long-lived species|^It is the venom of wildling spiders that transforms|^When the Spidersworn speak of themselves|^The Spidersworn follow the goddess Harawep|^Their purpose is to serve, translate, and speak for Harawep's creatures|^Is it possible to know the mind of a spider\?

^Invisible and intangible to untrained senses|^It is spell energy, not mana, that is created|^There are two competing theories for to categorize man|^Each frequency of mana is traditionally arrayed|^Field theory, which is proposed to better explain sorcerous|^Mana, simply, is the basic building block of magic|^While field theorists lack evidence for their model

^(?:Magical devices are, simply, devices that|A popular theory of magical genesis places|The mechanism for devices typically come in two forms|In addition, devices can be characterized as self-powered|There are some practical limits to these devices|Activation of a magical device can range|Due to the nature of mana incompatibility)

^The range of effects that Holy magic can conjure|^\w+ (?:and the clerk share a few words|exchanges some words with the clerk)|^Holy magic is theoretically the oldest form|^Holy magic derives both its name and its power|^Moreso than any other discipline of magic, Holy magicians|^While Holy magic is powered by the activity of the Immortals|^It is fair to say that Holy magic has a moralistic bend|^Despite this discipline's strong connection to the Immortals

^Attunement is a descriptive term referring to an individual magician's capacity|^Through guided meditation a nascent magician learns|^The initial process of attunement can take anywhere|^Once attuned, a magician may then concentrate|^Nearly everybody possesses the basic mental|^Fables exist about attunement the same as any other magical

^Life magic is perhaps the most mysterious realm|^Despite the name, Life mana is strongly identified|^While sufficient Life magic can accelerate|^Despite this, both the Empaths and Rangers|^Life mana is created by or resonate with|^The history of Life magic is incomplete|^Conspiracy theorists claim that the Empath Guild

^The youngest of the magical disciplines, Lunar magic's scholarly|^Lunar magic is, befitting the name, strongly affected|^Due to the nature of the forces that Lunar mages use|^Another facet of these forces is that they tend|^This volatility combined with a generally malicious edge|^Archeological evidence proves that a highly advanced form|^Moon Mages specifically derive much of the character

^In the year 403, as the Spider was on its way|^In the year 410, Kurmin and his engineers constructed|^Physically and mentally altered, Kurmin babbled|^That brings us to the year 432, when the Spider fell ill|^Will the Spider be able to recover\?

Named after Willowbrook Mysandanuva'r, the Mysandanuva'r Arena|The Owirvald Arena has smooth stone walls|Sel'hevor Arena contains walls carved with images|Stolnor Arena is nearly ostentatious in design|Tanglefoot Arena is Formed from a myriad|Tuulpon'u Arena has sinuous pillars|Verdegti Arena is littered with refuse|Ansprahv Drensyld sponsors the first arena|Drathrok, the Barbarian teacher known for popularizing|The Olgievi Arena contains deep pits|Waldegrave Arena is marked by snow white walls

^You feel like your powerful presence has gotten|^You notice \w+ attempting to stealthily|^It would help if you were closer|Your shotel is a little awkward|^You begin to stealthily advance|^However, nothing much else happens, as you lack the concentration
^The strong smell of ozone accompanies
^A thunderous din peals from the
^Appearing to have lost sight of its target
^You're already playing a song
Assuming you mean (?:a|an) \w+ eddy
